import json, re, unicodedata

# Load files
with open('/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
with open('/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

orig = "وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ إِذَا قَالُوا لِقَوْمِهِمْ إِن تَلِدُنَّ مِن بَعْدِهِنَّ فَرَجاً كَذَبْنَ فَإِذَا مَلَطَّنَهُنَّ بِالْغَضَبِ زَعَمْنَ حَقّاً وَهُمْ لِقَوْلِهِنَّ لَا يَزَالُونَ طَاعِنِينَ"

# Normalization function
def normalize(text):
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)  # remove punctuation except Arabic range
    # remove tashkeel
    tashkeel = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    text = tashkeel.sub('', text)
    # normalize alef forms
    text = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', text)
    text = re.sub('ى', 'ي', text)
    text = re.sub('ؤ', 'و', text)
    text = re.sub('ئ', 'ي', text)
    text = re.sub('ة', 'ه', text)
    text = re.sub('ٱ', 'ا', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('ـ', '')
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

norm_orig = normalize(orig)

# Search in quran
matches = []
for rec in quran:
    ayah = rec.get('ayah_text','')
    if not ayah: 
        continue
    if norm_orig in normalize(ayah):
        matches.append(ayah)

len(matches), matches[:3]

# Try fuzzy-like n-gram search: look for overlapping tokens
tokens = normalize(orig).split()
results = []
for rec in quran:
    ayah = rec.get('ayah_text','')
    ntext = normalize(ayah)
    overlap = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in ntext)
    if overlap >= 3:
        results.append((overlap, ayah))
# sort by overlap
results_sorted = sorted(results, key=lambda x: -x[0])
results_sorted[:10]

# Search hadith for overlapping tokens too
tokens = normalize(orig).split()
results_h = []
for rec in hadith:
    matn = rec.get('hadithTxt') or rec.get('Matn') or ''
    if not matn:
        continue
    ntext = normalize(matn)
    overlap = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in ntext)
    if overlap >= 5:
        results_h.append((overlap, matn[:300]))
sorted(results_h, key=lambda x: -x[0])[:10]
